commands.repair_reason: The remaining blockers are narrow, source-local approval-renderer fixes with clear tests, so a repair pass on the PR branch is appropriate.; Needs attention: The diff changes approval safety wording and still has concrete underreporting/control-text issues; no separate package supply-chain concern was found.; Review finding: [P2] Treat curl remote-name downloads as local writes — src/infra/plugin-approvals.ts:215-22... (sha=a785846b557dbed3a0f463e8ed9f38c0aacf5e78)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `approvals.plugin.language` config, plain-language plugin approval rendering, Matrix/Telegram/fallback wiring, docs, generated baselines, and renderer tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug report: this is a feature/config PR. The two blockers are source-reproducible from PR head plus the curl manual and Telegram/Matrix renderer code paths.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are narrow, source-local approval-renderer fixes with clear tests, so a repair pass on the PR branch is appropriate.
